rationale: The citing paper references Chandrashekaran et al. (2000) only once in the results section as an example of a similar prediction exercise when comparing quartiles under censoring. It is not used in hypothesis development, conceptual framing, model specification, or interpretation of substantive findings. The core hazard-model setup is justified mainly with other duration-model sources, so this citation functions as a limited methodological pointer rather than a meaningful building block.
